arts.ttl: Wojciech Szczesny opens up on process behind Barcelona move, reveals reasoning behind Juventus exit
arts.sum: Wojciech Szczesny is settling into life as a Barcelona player. Last week, his arrival was confirmed after La Liga gave their approval, and as things stand, he would be able to make his debut immediately after the international break. Szczesny came out of retirement to join the La Liga leaders. After his stay at Juventus […] The post Wojciech Szczesny opens up on process behind Barcelona move, reveals reasoning behind Juventus exit appeared first on Football España.
